summary: Video. Night-time pool-style coverage of Air Force One taxiing on the tarmac at Beijing airport with an honor guard watching, followed by Trump descending the stairs into a crowd. It has an ambient music bed (music_score 0.91). It is continuous event coverage of the arrival with no montage editing, graphics, or stylized editing.
notable_text: Tweet: '.@POTUS is officially wheels down in Beijing ahead of his historic Summit. It's the first state visit of a sitting U.S. president to China since President Trump's last visit in 2017.'
